title: Malty Aerated Ukrainian Egg Yolks Bake
description: A hangover-cure breakfast dish from Ukraine featuring egg yolks and a malty flavor, made pescatarian-friendly with the addition of aquatic plants.

ingredients.name: aquatic plants
ingredients.notes: such as dulse or sea spaghetti

instructions: In a small bowl, combine yeast, water, and a pinch of salt. Let it sit for 5 minutes to activate.
In a large mixing bowl, combine rye flour, oat flour, egg yolks, and salt. Mix until a sticky dough forms.
Add the activated yeast mixture to the dough and mix until fully incorporated.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with plastic wrap, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Punch down the dough and shape it into a round loaf. Place it in a greased 6-quart pressure cooker.
Close the pressure cooker lid and cook for 20 minutes. Let the pressure release naturally for 10 minutes.
Remove the loaf from the pressure cooker and let it cool for 10 minutes.
Slice the loaf into thick slices and serve warm, garnished with chopped fresh dill.
Optional: Drizzle with honey for added sweetness and malty flavor.
Optional: Serve with a side of egg nog for added creamy texture.
